mapper.select: select worker_name ,etc ,worker_id from tb_worker_mst where area_cd = #{areaCd} and process_cd = #{procCd} order by worker_name
select equipment_name ,equipment_cd ,equipment_id from tb_equipment_mst where storage_cd = #{storageCd} order by display_order

select a.* ,b.mat_name ,c.test_nos ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as item_name ,b.spec_info ,b.ex_appearance ,b.packing_spec_value ,b.packing_spec_unit ,c.req_qty ,c.tot_Use_Qty ,c.bad_qty ,c.work_bad_qty ,(select unit from tb_item_mst where item_cd = isnull(c.item_cd, a.item_cd) ) as unit from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join tb_item_detail b on b.item_cd = a.item_cd left outer join tb_prod_info c on a.work_proc_id = c.work_proc_id where a.proc_cd = #{procCd} and a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
